text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One common use is text understanding, where computers analyze sentences to get their meaning. Another important application is translation, allowing machines to convert text from one language to another, like English to Spanish. Sentiment analysis is also popular; it examines social media posts or reviews to decide if the writer feels positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, chatbots use NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions or providing customer service. These tools make our interaction with technology much easier and more natural.
